datasets.name: ds_1_overall_risk
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    COUNT(*) AS Provider_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.train_features
GROUP BY PotentialFraud

datasets.name: ds_2_financial_exposure
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    SUM(InscClaimAmtReimbursed) AS Total_Reimbursed
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY PotentialFraud

datasets.name: ds_3_amount_buckets
datasets.displayName: 3. Fraud Rate by Claim Amount Buckets
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 1000  THEN '< $1K'
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 5000  THEN '$1K–$5K'
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 10000 THEN '$5K–$10K'
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 50000 THEN '$10K–$50K'
        ELSE '> $50K'
    END AS Amount_Bucket,
    CASE
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 1000  THEN 1
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 5000  THEN 2
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 10000 THEN 3
        WHEN InscClaimAmtReimbursed < 50000 THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END AS Sort_Order,
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    COUNT(*) AS Claim_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY Amount_Bucket, Sort_Order, PotentialFraud
ORDER BY Sort_Order

datasets.name: ds_4_provider_behavior
queryLines:
SELECT 
    Provider, 
    ClaimCount, 
    AvgClaimAmt, 
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type
FROM capstone.bronze.train_features

datasets.name: ds_5_inpatient_outpatient
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN claim_type = 1 THEN 'Inpatient' ELSE 'Outpatient' END AS Claim_Setting,
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    COUNT(*) AS Claim_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY Claim_Setting, PotentialFraud

datasets.name: ds_6_care_duration
queryLines:
SELECT 
    ClaimDuration,
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    COUNT(*) AS Claim_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
WHERE ClaimDuration >= 0 AND ClaimDuration <= 30 
GROUP BY ClaimDuration, PotentialFraud
ORDER BY ClaimDuration

datasets.name: ds_7_upcoding
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    AVG(ChronicConditionCount) AS Avg_Conditions_Per_Patient
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY PotentialFraud

datasets.name: ds_8_regional_fraud
queryLines:
SELECT 
    State, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT Provider) as Fraud_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
WHERE PotentialFraud = 1
GROUP BY State
ORDER BY Fraud_Count DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_9_demographics
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Age < 40 THEN '1. < 40'
        WHEN Age BETWEEN 40 AND 64 THEN '2. 40 - 64'
        WHEN Age BETWEEN 65 AND 80 THEN '3. 65 - 80'
        ELSE '4. 80+' 
    END AS Age_Group,
    CASE WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent' ELSE 'Legitimate' END AS Provider_Type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT BeneID) AS Patient_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY Age_Group, PotentialFraud
ORDER BY Age_Group

datasets.name: ds_10_ai_risk
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Risk_Score >= 0.75 THEN '1. High Risk (Audit Immediately)'
        WHEN Risk_Score >= 0.40 THEN '2. Medium Risk (Review)'
        ELSE '3. Low Risk (Auto-Approve)'
    END AS Risk_Tier,
    COUNT(*) AS Provider_Count
FROM (
    SELECT
        Provider,
        (
            (AvgClaimAmt / 57000.0) * 0.30
            + InpatientRate * 0.25
            + ((ClaimsPerBeneficiary - 1) / 9.0) * 0.25
            + LEAST(DeceasedPatientRate * 50, 1.0) * 0.20
        ) AS Risk_Score
    FROM capstone.bronze.provider_lookup
) scored
GROUP BY Risk_Tier
ORDER BY Risk_Tier

datasets.name: ds_11_provider_action_queue
queryLines:
SELECT
    Provider,
    ROUND(Risk_Score, 4) AS Risk_Score,
    ROUND(TotalClaimAmt, 2) AS Total_Exposure,
    ClaimCount,
    ROUND(AvgClaimAmt, 2) AS Avg_Claim_Amount,
    CASE
        WHEN Risk_Score >= 0.75 THEN 'High'
        WHEN Risk_Score >= 0.40 THEN 'Medium'
        ELSE 'Low'
    END AS Risk_Band
FROM (
    SELECT
        Provider,
        ClaimCount,
        AvgClaimAmt,
        TotalClaimAmt,
        (
            (AvgClaimAmt / 57000.0) * 0.30
            + InpatientRate * 0.25
            + ((ClaimsPerBeneficiary - 1) / 9.0) * 0.25
            + LEAST(DeceasedPatientRate * 50, 1.0) * 0.20
        ) AS Risk_Score
    FROM capstone.bronze.provider_lookup
) scored
ORDER BY Risk_Score DESC, Total_Exposure DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_12_data_split_volume
queryLines:
SELECT
    'Train Claims' AS Data_Split,
    COUNT(*) AS Claim_Count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Provider) AS Provider_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Holdout Claims' AS Data_Split,
    COUNT(*) AS Claim_Count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Provider) AS Provider_Count
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered_test

datasets.name: 0b0c98d6
datasets.displayName: Fraud Analysis by Age Group and Chronic Conditions
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Age < 40 THEN '1. < 40'
        WHEN Age BETWEEN 40 AND 64 THEN '2. 40-64'
        WHEN Age BETWEEN 65 AND 80 THEN '3. 65-80'
        ELSE '4. 80+' 
    END AS Age_Group,
    ChronicConditionCount AS Chronic_Conditions,
    AVG(CAST(PotentialFraud AS FLOAT)) * 100 AS Fraud_Rate_Percentage
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY Age_Group, ChronicConditionCount

datasets.name: 0e6b49fa
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN PotentialFraud = 1 THEN 'Fraudulent'
    ELSE 'Legitimate'
  END AS Record_Type,
  COUNT(*) AS Record_Count
FROM
  capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
GROUP BY
  PotentialFraud

datasets.name: c94bb510
datasets.displayName: Healthcare Fraud Totals by Care Setting Summary
queryLines:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN claim_type = 1 THEN 'Inpatient Hospital Stays' 
         ELSE 'Outpatient / Clinic Visits' END AS Care_Setting,
    SUM(InscClaimAmtReimbursed) AS Total_Fraud_Dollars
FROM capstone.bronze.claims_engineered
WHERE PotentialFraud = 1
GROUP BY claim_type

datasets.name: a7749ccc
queryLines:
SELECT
  '1. Total Providers Evaluated' AS Funnel_Stage,
  COUNT(*) AS Provider_Count
FROM
  capstone.bronze.provider_lookup

UNION ALL

SELECT
  '2. Flagged as High/Medium Risk',
  COUNT(*)
FROM
  capstone.bronze.provider_lookup
WHERE
  (
    (AvgClaimAmt / 57000.0) * 0.3
    + InpatientRate * 0.25
    + ((ClaimsPerBeneficiary - 1) / 9.0) * 0.25
    + LEAST(DeceasedPatientRate * 50, 1.0) * 0.2
  ) >= 0.40

UNION ALL

SELECT
  '3. Sent to LLM for Review',
  COUNT(*)
FROM
  capstone.bronze.provider_lookup
WHERE
  (
    (AvgClaimAmt / 57000.0) * 0.3
    + InpatientRate * 0.25
    + ((ClaimsPerBeneficiary - 1) / 9.0) * 0.25
    + LEAST(DeceasedPatientRate * 50, 1.0) * 0.2

datasets.name: a80f25f0
queryLines:
SELECT 
    '1. Total Providers Evaluated' AS Funnel_Stage, COUNT(*) AS Volume FROM capstone.bronze.provider_lookup
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    '2. Flagged as High/Medium Risk', COUNT(*) FROM capstone.bronze.provider_lookup WHERE ((AvgClaimAmt / 57000.0) * 0.30 + InpatientRate * 0.25 + ((ClaimsPerBeneficiary - 1) / 9.0) * 0.25 + LEAST(DeceasedPatientRate * 50, 1.0) * 0.20) >= 0.40
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    '3. Sent to LLM for Review', COUNT(*) FROM capstone.bronze.provider_lookup WHERE ((AvgClaimAmt / 57000.0) * 0.30 + InpatientRate * 0.25 + ((ClaimsPerBeneficiary - 1) / 9.0) * 0.25 + LEAST(DeceasedPatientRate * 50, 1.0) * 0.20) >= 0.75
ORDER BY Funnel_Stage

datasets.name: ff29c32d
queryLines:
SELECT 'AvgClaimAmt' AS Feature, 0.31 AS Importance
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ClaimCount', 0.22
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ClaimsPerBeneficiary', 0.19
UNION ALL
SELECT 'InpatientRate', 0.16
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DeceasedPatientRate', 0.12

datasets.name: 6bf55163
queryLines:
SELECT 'Logistic Regression' AS Model, 0.84 AS Precision, 0.77 AS Recall, 0.80 AS F1, 0.89 AS ROC_AUC
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Decision Tree', 0.81, 0.79, 0.80, 0.87
UNION ALL
SELECT 'XGBoost', 0.91, 0.86, 0.88, 0.95
